---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability, API, or behavior
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem or use case

What are you trying to do? What is not possible — or is painful — today?

## Proposed solution

A description of what you would like Lenny to do. If you have an idea about the API or configuration surface, sketch it.

## Alternatives considered

Other ways you thought about solving this, and why you did not pick them.

## Spec impact

Does this touch the specification in [`spec/`](https://github.com/lennylabs/lenny/tree/main/spec)? If so, which sections? If the change is large enough to need an [ADR](https://github.com/lennylabs/lenny/tree/main/docs/adr), note that here.

## Additional context

Related discussions, prior art from other platforms, links to relevant issues, etc.
